Session timeout

You haven't used this form for a while - to protect your data, the form session will expire soon

We use cookies on your computer or mobile device to help make this website better.

Tell me more

    3. Translate our website
    Menu
    1. My Account
    2. Events and activities
    3. Translate our website
    header.breadcrumb
    1. Home
    2. Rubbish and recycling
    3. Look up my collection day

    Look up my collection day

    Check your collection day with our handy lookup tool.

    We make household rubbish and recycling collections Monday to Friday, starting at 6am.

    Please note:

    • General waste, clear recycling bags, garden waste and food waste are collected on the same day as each other.
    • All collections are made from the front of your property.
    • Place your rubbish and recycling at the front boundary of your property by 6am on your collection day.
    • If you do not have a front garden, leave the tied bag(s) on the pavement the night before collection day (no earlier than 5.30pm).

    Check your collection day

    Look up your collection day by entering your postcode below, clicking on 'Find address' and then select an address from the drop-down list.

    Alternatively, view the next bank holiday collection dates.

    1. Label
      2. Address
        1. Find Address
        2. We were unable to retrieve your collection day information.
        4. Collection Address

Session timeout

You haven't used this form for a while - to protect your data, the form session will expire soon

Link to homepage

    3. Translate our website
    Menu
    1. My Account
    2. Events and activities
    3. Translate our website
    header.breadcrumb
    1. Home
    2. Rubbish and recycling
    3. Look up my collection day

    Look up my collection day

    Check your collection day with our handy lookup tool.

    We make household rubbish and recycling collections Monday to Friday, starting at 6am.

    Please note:

    • General waste, clear recycling bags, garden waste and food waste are collected on the same day as each other.
    • All collections are made from the front of your property.
    • Place your rubbish and recycling at the front boundary of your property by 6am on your collection day.
    • If you do not have a front garden, leave the tied bag(s) on the pavement the night before collection day (no earlier than 5.30pm).

    Check your collection day

    Look up your collection day by entering your postcode below, clicking on 'Find address' and then select an address from the drop-down list.

    Alternatively, view the next bank holiday collection dates.

    1. Label
      2. Address
        1. Find Address
        2. We were unable to retrieve your collection day information.
        4. Collection Address

    • HillingdonFirst card
    • Jobs
